query: I am looking for black-orchid by tom-ford.

recommendations.name: Black Orchid
recommendations.reason: This is the original Black Orchid fragrance, and it matches your scent brief.

recommendations.name: Black Orchid Parfum
recommendations.reason: This parfum version of Black Orchid has a similar earthy and sweet accord to the original, with a stronger patchouli note in the base.

recommendations.name: Black Orchid Voile de Fleur
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a fruity and floral top note, followed by a sweet and woody middle note, which might appeal to you if you like the original Black Orchid.

query: Can you recommend the fragrance named j-adore by dior?

recommendations.name: j-adore
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a similar scent profile to j-adore, with a focus on white floral and fruity notes.

recommendations.name: j-adore-absolu
recommendations.reason: As an absolute version of j-adore, this fragrance shares many of the same floral and citrus notes, but with a more intense and concentrated scent.

recommendations.name: j-adore-infinissime
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a similar blend of white floral and woody notes to j-adore, with the added depth of sandalwood in its base.

query: I want a citrus and woody fragrance from Dior.

recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines citrus and woody accords, matching your brief.

recommendations.name: I-Love-Dior

recommendations.name: Aether
recommendations.reason: This woody and fruity fragrance has a citrus presence in its top accord, making it a suitable match for your preferences.

query: Recommend a warm spicy vanilla perfume by Tom Ford.

recommendations.name: cocktail-intense
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a warm spicy vanilla accord, which matches your request. It also has woody and sweet notes that complement the vanilla.

recommendations.name: vanilla-28
recommendations.reason: As its name suggests, this fragrance is all about vanilla, with a sweet amber accord that should appeal to your taste. It also has woody and warm spicy notes.

recommendations.name: black-orchid-perfume-lalique-edition
recommendations.reason: Although this fragrance is not primarily vanilla, it does have a sweet and earthy accord that might appeal to you. The warm spicy notes also match your request.

query: I want a fragrance with tobacco, vanilla, and woody warmth.

recommendations.name: M-Eau-Joe-No-3-Hollywood-Whiskey-Fragrance
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has tobacco, vanilla, and woody warmth in its accords and notes, making it a great match for your preferences.

recommendations.name: GS
recommendations.reason: This fragrance also features tobacco, vanilla, and smoky notes, which align with your desired scent profile.

recommendations.name: Vanilla-Era
recommendations.reason: While not as prominent, this fragrance does have vanilla and woody notes, making it a decent match for your preferences. The fresh spicy accord might also appeal to you.

query: Find me something combining rose, musk, and sandalwood.

recommendations.name: Attar-Mubakhar
recommendations.reason: Combines rose, musk, and sandalwood notes, with a woody and powdery accord that should appeal to your preferences.

recommendations.name: Une-Rose-Au-Paradis-R-B
recommendations.reason: Features a strong rose note, combined with musk, incense, and sandalwood for a sensual and woody dry down that should match your expectations.

recommendations.name: Floral-Rose
recommendations.reason: Has a prominent rose note, accompanied by sweet and woody accords, including sandalwood and musk, which should provide the combination you're looking for.

query: I want bergamot, lavender, and cedar in an aromatic style.

recommendations.name: Cedarwood and Bergamot
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines bergamot with cedar, which matches your request for bergamot and cedar. The aromatic style also aligns with your preference.

recommendations.name: Green Lavender Cologne Intense
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features lavender as a main accord, which you requested. It also has bergamot in the top notes and a woody base that includes cedar.

recommendations.name: Velvet Lavender
recommendations.reason: This fragrance is primarily lavender-based, which meets your request for lavender. It also has bergamot in the top notes and a powdery base that might complement the cedar you're looking for.

query: Recommend a white floral with jasmine and tuberose.

recommendations.name: A-Marriage-Of-Jasmine-Tuberose
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features jasmine and tuberose as its main floral notes, making it a great match for your scent brief.

recommendations.name: Symbol Eau De Parfum
recommendations.reason: This fragrance also highlights tuberose and jasmine sambac in its middle notes, providing a similar white floral profile to what you're looking for.

recommendations.name: Jasmine Of Athens
recommendations.reason: While this fragrance focuses more on vanilla and sweet accords, it does feature jasmine as its main top note, which could complement the tuberose and white floral notes you're looking for.

query: I want something that feels like reading in an old library on a rainy evening.

recommendations.name: School
recommendations.reason: The combination of rubber, mineral, and paper accords in School evoke a sense of nostalgia and old-world charm, making it a perfect match for your desire to feel like reading in an old library on a rainy evening.

recommendations.name: In-The-Rain
recommendations.reason: The woody and citrus notes in In-The-Rain create a cozy atmosphere reminiscent of a rainy day, while the musky undertones add depth and warmth. This fragrance is sure to transport you to a peaceful library setting.

recommendations.name: Touch-The-Rain
recommendations.reason: The aquatic and green notes in Touch-The-Rain evoke the feeling of raindrops on old books, while the aromatic and fresh accords create a sense of calmness. This fragrance is perfect for those who want to feel like they're reading in an old library on a rainy evening.

query: I want a dark, mysterious scent that feels warm and intimate.

recommendations.name: Spectre Ghost
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a warm and spicy accord, with notes of vanilla and patchouli that evoke a sense of intimacy.

recommendations.name: Les
recommendations.reason: The combination of floral, fruity, and citrus notes in Les creates a mysterious and alluring scent that feels warm and inviting.

recommendations.name: Six Scents Series Three Four Rad Hourani Ascent
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a smoky and powdery accord, with notes of rose and leather that add depth and mystery to the scent. The warm spicy notes also evoke a sense of intimacy.

query: I want something like sunlight in a citrus herb garden after rain.

recommendations.name: Touch the Rain
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines floral, aquatic, and green notes to evoke the feeling of sunlight in a citrus herb garden after rain.

recommendations.name: Like a Walk in the Summer Rain
recommendations.reason: With its marine, aquatic, and citrus accords, this fragrance captures the freshness and vitality of a summer rain shower.

recommendations.name: By Virtue of Sunbeams
recommendations.reason: This fragrance's amber, citrus, and balsamic notes evoke the warmth and brightness of sunlight, making it a great match for your scent brief.

query: I want a cozy bakery scent with coffee, cocoa, and soft sweetness.

recommendations.name: Cafe Cacao
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines warm spicy, sweet, and chocolate notes with a soft sweetness, making it a perfect match for your scent brief.

recommendations.name: Cocoa Tuberose
recommendations.reason: The combination of cacao, patchouli, and amber in this fragrance will evoke the cozy bakery scent you're looking for, with a subtle floral note from tuberose.

recommendations.name: Cafe
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features coffee notes in its top accord, along with citrus and vanilla, which will provide the cozy bakery scent you're looking for. The powdery and floral notes in the base add depth to the scent.

query: I need a clean and understated fragrance for the office.

recommendations.name: clean-fragrance
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a clean and understated profile with citrus, fresh spicy, and aromatic notes that would be perfect for the office.

recommendations.name: clean-air
recommendations.reason: Clean-Air is another great option that captures the essence of freshness and airiness, making it suitable for everyday wear in an office setting.

recommendations.name: clean-shower-fresh-for-men
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a clean and invigorating scent with citrus and fresh spicy notes that would be great for men to wear in the office.

query: I want a warm, elegant scent for a winter evening date.

recommendations.name: Sky Father
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines warm spicy, citrus, and aromatic accords to create a perfect blend for a winter evening date. The presence of clove, cinnamon, and musk will evoke feelings of coziness and intimacy.

recommendations.name: Lovers
recommendations.reason: This woody, warm spicy fragrance features passionfruit and plum notes that will add a romantic touch to your evening date. The presence of rose and saffron will also create a sense of elegance.

recommendations.name: Guardian
recommendations.reason: This aromatic, woody fragrance features sage and bergamot notes that will evoke feelings of freshness and earthiness. The presence of patchouli and amber will add depth and warmth to the scent, making it perfect for a winter evening date.

query: I want a relaxed scent for a weekend by the sea.

recommendations.name: beso-dorado
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines aromatic, woody, and fresh spicy notes with a calming lavender top note, making it perfect for a relaxed weekend by the sea.

recommendations.name: bendito-beso
recommendations.reason: With its aquatic and floral accords, this fragrance captures the essence of a seaside escape. The fresh and citrusy top notes will transport you to a sunny day by the ocean.

recommendations.name: beso-pasion
recommendations.reason: This woody and aromatic fragrance features a warm spicy accord that evokes the feeling of a cozy beachside retreat. The citrus and green tea notes add a refreshing touch, making it an excellent choice for a relaxing weekend.

query: I want vanilla and woody notes, but nothing strongly fruity.

recommendations.name: Joop Thrill Man

recommendations.name: Coeur de Noisette
recommendations.reason: With its nutty, sweet, and warm spicy accords, this fragrance should appeal to your love of vanilla and woody notes.

query: I want a jasmine white floral fragrance without a rose note.

recommendations.name: Un Air de Dams-Jasmine
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features jasmine as its main floral note, without any rose notes. It also has a green and woody accord that will complement the jasmine nicely.

recommendations.reason: This fragrance has jasmine as its middle note, surrounded by warm spicy and white floral accords. The base notes of spicy and amber will add depth to the scent without overpowering the jasmine.

recommendations.name: Impossible Bouquet Olene
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features jasmine as one of its main floral notes, along with honeysuckle and wisteria. The green and white flower accords will provide a fresh and airy quality that complements the jasmine nicely.

query: Something that smells like rain falling on cold stone.

recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines woody and citrus notes with a powdery dry down, evoking the sensation of rain falling on cold stone.

recommendations.name: when-the-rain-stops

recommendations.name: school
recommendations.reason: This unique fragrance features rubber and mineral notes that evoke the sensation of rain falling on a cold, damp surface. The woody base adds depth to the scent.

query: A scent that feels like sunlight passing through a quiet forest.

recommendations.name: Guardian
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines woody, earthy, and herbal notes with a fresh spicy accord, evoking the feeling of sunlight passing through a quiet forest.

recommendations.name: Equestrian
